content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月05日 周五
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [jd-opensource/JoyAI-Echo](https://github.com/jd-opensource/JoyAI-Echo)
   JoyAI-Echo: Pushing the Frontier of Long Audio-Visual Generation | ⭐392
2. [tastyeffectco/sandboxes](https://github.com/tastyeffectco/sandboxes)
   Self-hosted dev sandboxes with preview URLs. One command. No Kubernetes, perfect | ⭐381
3. [Fullive-AI/Anima](https://github.com/Fullive-AI/Anima)
   Make Every Hardware Intelligent — an open-source Agent OS for hardware intellige | ⭐226
4. [zonghaoyuan/infiplot](https://github.com/zonghaoyuan/infiplot)
   InfiPlot is the world's first interactive plot game that AI generates all text a | ⭐190
5. [zarazhangrui/beautiful-feishu-whiteboard](https://github.com/zarazhangrui/beautiful-feishu-whiteboard)
   35 curated colour palette styles for building beautiful, editable Feishu / Lark  | ⭐176
6. [Soul-AILab/SoulX-Transcriber](https://github.com/Soul-AILab/SoulX-Transcriber)
   An end-to-end framework for multi-speaker transcription that jointly models who  | ⭐168
7. [zaydmulani09/mnemo](https://github.com/zaydmulani09/mnemo)
   Local-first AI memory layer for any LLM. Persistent knowledge graph, entity extr | ⭐160
8. [krispuckett/SwiftUIShaders](https://github.com/krispuckett/SwiftUIShaders)
   41 hand-curated drop-in SwiftUI Metal shader effects — holographic foil, kaleido | ⭐153

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
